parsed.generic_mechanism: The largest gap is sequence integrity: one version develops claims through setup, illustration, consequence, and handoff, while the other rearranges those units so local clarity cannot accumulate into chapter-level meaning.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A builds a coherent argument through domestic scenes, conditioning examples, an addiction cycle, and the failure of restriction, though repeated assurances and an extended late argument flatten the pace; the final bullet recap slightly weakens the transition.
paraphrased_evidence.B: B preserves concrete details and locally readable sentences, but scrambles premises, examples, headings, and callbacks; questions precede their setups, transitions lose their referents, and the text ends by arriving at its own opening apparatus.
